- New data layer (`ScheduleEntry`, `ScheduleEntryRepository`, `Work`, `WorkRepository`, `SampleEventRepository`)

- New `CourseDetailScreen`
- Updates to `MainActivity`, `HomeScreen`, `AddEditEntryScreen`, `ClassScheduleScreen`, build config, and launcher icons

content.text: Done. The full project including `.claude-sessions` is now pushed to `main` on the Project repo.

data.command: PROJECT_KEY=$(pwd | sed 's|[ /_]|-|g'); SESSION_DIR="$HOME/.claude/projects/$PROJECT_KEY"; DEST="$(pwd)/.claude-sessions"; mkdir -p "$DEST"; for f in "$SESSION_DIR"/*.jsonl; do [ -f "$f" ] && cp "$f" "$DEST/" 2>/dev/null; done
